'''ngozhangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leafless|leafless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leafless|leafless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngozhangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhangithi|ngozhangithi]] || [[word:ngozhangiji|ngozhangiji]] || [[word:ngozhangishi|ngozhangishi]] || [[word:ngozhangiki|ngozhangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhanguthuthu|ngozhanguthuthu]] || [[word:ngozhangujuju|ngozhangujuju]] || [[word:ngozhangushushu|ngozhangushushu]] || [[word:ngozhangukuku|ngozhangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhanguthu|ngozhanguthu]] || [[word:ngozhanguju|ngozhanguju]] || [[word:ngozhangushu|ngozhangushu]] || [[word:ngozhanguku|ngozhanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhangufthuf|ngozhangufthuf]] || [[word:ngozhangufjuf|ngozhangufjuf]] || [[word:ngozhangufshuf|ngozhangufshuf]] || [[word:ngozhangufkuf|ngozhangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhangethe|ngozhangethe]] || [[word:ngozhangeje|ngozhangeje]] || [[word:ngozhangeshe|ngozhangeshe]] || [[word:ngozhangeke|ngozhangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhangothotho|ngozhangothotho]] || [[word:ngozhangojojo|ngozhangojojo]] || [[word:ngozhangoshosho|ngozhangoshosho]] || [[word:ngozhangokoko|ngozhangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhangotho|ngozhangotho]] || [[word:ngozhangojo|ngozhangojo]] || [[word:ngozhangosho|ngozhangosho]] || [[word:ngozhangoko|ngozhangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhangofthof|ngozhangofthof]] || [[word:ngozhangofjof|ngozhangofjof]] || [[word:ngozhangofshof|ngozhangofshof]] || [[word:ngozhangofkof|ngozhangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŠthĂŠ|ngozhangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŠjĂŠ|ngozhangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŠshĂŠ|ngozhangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhangĂŠkĂŠ|ngozhangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhangathatha|ngozhangathatha]] || [[word:ngozhangajaja|ngozhangajaja]] || [[word:ngozhangashasha|ngozhangashasha]] || [[word:ngozhangakaka|ngozhangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhangatha|ngozhangatha]] || [[word:ngozhangaja|ngozhangaja]] || [[word:ngozhangasha|ngozhangasha]] || [[word:ngozhangaka|ngozhangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhangafthaf|ngozhangafthaf]] || [[word:ngozhangafjaf|ngozhangafjaf]] || [[word:ngozhangafshaf|ngozhangafshaf]] || [[word:ngozhangafkaf|ngozhangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngozhangasha|ngozhangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhangshĂ«sha|ngozhangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhangrosha|ngozhangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhangmusha|ngozhangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhangyasha|ngozhangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhangnkshĂ«sha|gongozhangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhangnkrosha|gongozhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhangnkmusha|gongozhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhangnkyasha|gongozhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngozhazhangasha|ngozhazhangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhazhangshĂ«sha|ngozhazhangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhazhangrosha|ngozhazhangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhazhangmusha|ngozhazhangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhazhangyasha|ngozhazhangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhazhangnkshĂ«sha|gongozhazhangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhazhangnkrosha|gongozhazhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhazhangnkmusha|gongozhazhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhazhangnkyasha|gongozhazhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngezhĂŠngasha|ngezhĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠngshĂ«sha|ngezhĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠngrosha|ngezhĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠngmusha|ngezhĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠngyasha|ngezhĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gongezhĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠngnkrosha|gongezhĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠngnkmusha|gongezhĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠngnkyasha|gongezhĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngozhfangasha|ngozhfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhfangshĂ«sha|ngozhfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhfangrosha|ngozhfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhfangmusha|ngozhfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhfangyasha|ngozhfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhfangnkshĂ«sha|gongozhfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhfangnkrosha|gongozhfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhfangnkmusha|gongozhfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhfangnkyasha|gongozhfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
